arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta defends his low-block tactics against Man City - and insists trying to attack the champions with 10 men is like 'wearing flip flops and shorts' in winter
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: Mikel Arteta has mocked critics of Arsenal's recent playing style as he compared calls to attack Manchester City with 10 men to wearing 'flip flops and shorts' in the rain.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola fires back at Mikel Arteta and declares 'WAR' on Arsenal after Manchester City's heated 2-2 draw against the Gunners at the Etihad
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Pep Guardiola has called on Arsenal's Mikel Arteta to clarify barbed comments he made towards Manchester City in the wake of last weekend's ill-tempered draw.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tells Liverpool to be wary of 'unlucky' Wolves despite the Reds' absurd record against bottom-half teams... and is happy to go under the radar in title race with Man City and Arsenal
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: Arne Slot urged Liverpool fans not to take three points for granted at bottom club Wolves Saturday as the Premier League's financial dominance means every opponent is a threat.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | PSG 3-1 Rennes: Bradley Barcola scores brace before Champions League showdown against Arsenal
arts.sum: Ligue 1 McDonald’s, Round 6, 27/09/24 In the absence of key personnel with Gianluigi Donnarumma, Lucas Hernandez, Nuno Mendes, Vitinha, Marco Asensio and Gonçalo Ramos all missing out through injury,…

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on David Raya injury, Man City criticism and Arsenal youngsters
arts.sum: A lot of work from the coaches, the players has gone into that, developing those relationships and building trust within the team, the squad, in many different phases, and during games that we are comfortable to do that. It’s not just with Martin – he’s obviously one of our best players and one of the players who has the biggest impact on the team in many ways - but there are many others as well.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea scouts stunned by wonderkid's goal
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea scouts were in attendance as Max Moerstedt scored a stunning Europa League goal, according to a report. Arsenal and Chelsea scouts stunned by wonderkid's goal

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Arteta don't need to win title despite disappointing trophy haul - McCoist
arts.sum: Pundit Ally McCoist tells Sports Mole that Mikel Arteta does not need to win the Premier League title with Arsenal this season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 'agree contract extension' with Arsenal & Liverpool target
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reported to have struck a deal to extend the contract of winger Anthony Gordon amid interest in the England international from both Arsenal and Chelsea. As the transfer window closed, Arsenal emerged as long-term admirers of Gordon but Newcastle officials made it clear they had plans to extend the 23-year-old's contract.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Arsenal star finally finds new club after signing for League Two side
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Carl Jenksinon has been without employment since leaving Australian side Newcastle Jets but is now back in English football after a move to a League Two club

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal star and England international completes surprise move to League Two side Bromley... and could make his debut on Saturday
arts.sum: League Two side Bromley have announced the surprise signing of a former Arsenal star.
